pr.title: Dedicated adventure shop UI with proper navigation and visual clarity improvements
pr.body:
Three issues addressed: adventure shop nodes redirect to the main store (wrong UI, wrong back-navigation), work/study/rest activities are visually indistinguishable in the scheduler, and the training log area lacks a visible scrollbar as entries accumulate.

### Adventure shop separation
- Added `'shopping'` status to `AdventureState.status` union type
- Shop nodes now set `status: 'shopping'` instead of `activeScreen: 'store'`, keeping the player in the adventure screen
- Inline adventure shop UI in `AdventureMap.tsx` with themed styling (emerald for 驛站, purple for 黑市) and filtered item list (combat consumables only)
- "返回修行路徑" returns to `exploring` status instead of main screen

```tsx
// Before: redirected to main store
activeScreen: 'store'

// After: stays in adventure with dedicated shop UI  
nextAdv.status = 'shopping';
```

### Save/Load completeness
- `SaveLoadPanel` was missing `cheatMode`, `unlockedCharacters`, `completedEndings`, `unlockedAchievements`, `lastFatherInteractionMonth` from save data — loading from start screen would lose these fields
- "讀取存檔" button enlarged with glow effect for discoverability

### Scheduler activity differentiation
- `ActivityCard` uses type-specific color schemes: emerald/💰 for work, indigo/📖 for study, gold/😴 for rest
- Added `border-l-4` stripe and expanded description from `line-clamp-1` → `line-clamp-2`

### Training log scrollbar
- Changed `overflow-y-auto` → `overflow-y-scroll` with `.scrollbar-visible` CSS class (gold-themed, webkit + Firefox `scrollbar-color`)
- Fixed height `h-48`, added record count in header
pr.author: Copilot
